assets.notes: Source-authored FPS arms/weapon animation blend. Contains 55 actions and meshes Arms, placeholderWeapon, Plane.

assets.source: Exported from FPSPlayer.blend with Blender 4.4.3 on THECAULDRON, export_animation_mode=ACTIONS, GLB format, Draco disabled.
assets.notes: Validated with Three GLTFLoader: 55 animations, Arms SkinnedMesh, placeholderWeapon mesh, WeaponR/WeaponL/Camera bones.
Meshy texture FBX package containing an updated two-leg FPSPlayer body and companion PBR textures.

assets.notes: Meshy PBR texture set for Pose Lab FPS Arms. The FBX body is no longer used; the original FPSPlayer mesh stays authoritative and receives the newer texture maps directly.

assets.source: C:/Users/dclar/workspace/arcane-manifold/models/Forgeborn.glb on THECAULDRON; copied into standalone pose lab after confirming arcane-manifold was clean and up to date.
assets.notes: Arcane Manifold player scene instantiates this as res://models/Forgeborn.glb under $Model. Used as the full-body target rig for FPSPlayer arm retarget tests.

Copied Animation_Idle_Step_Turn_Left_withSkin, Animation_Idle_Turn_Right_withSkin, Animation_Walking_withSkin, and Animation_Walk_Backward_withSkin. Loaded as extra native leg/turn clips on the Arcane Full Rig actor.
Scene reference proves the active player model path, AnimationPlayer path, and FootIKRoot setup used by Arcane Manifold.
Source copy for the active Infinite Brutality orc berserker idle/model FBX. Copied into Pose Lab so mocap cleanup can inspect the actual enemy rig.
Active visible enemy model used by Infinite Brutality. Pose Lab loads this as the Orc Cleanup actor base rig and scales it to 2.35m.
Source archive for the Pro Melee Axe motion FBX set used by the pressure-ring orc enemy. License/provenance beyond local download name is not yet documented.
Pose Lab cleanup export of the smoothed horizontal swing. Startup and AttackHorizontal should use this edited version instead of the raw horizontal swing.

Runtime subset copied for mocap cleanup: idle, walk forward, walk left/right, run, jump, three melee attacks, and large gut reaction. Orc profile strips hips/root XZ from traversal while preserving hip Y motion.
Downloaded FBX hit-reaction pack staged for Orc Cleanup import. Contains Kidney Hit, Big Hit To Head, Hit To Body, and two Head Hit variants.
Downloaded FBX pack staged for Orc Cleanup import. Contains Mutant Dying plus idle, walking, run, jump, and punch candidates.

assets.source: Extracted from assets/source/orc_berserker/import_packs/Kidney Hit (1).zip and Mutant Dying.zip with sanitized lowercase filenames for direct Pose Lab loading.
assets.notes: Pose Lab-only Orc candidate clip set: big_hit_to_head_3, head_hit_4, head_hit_5, hit_to_body_2, kidney_hit_1, mutant_dying, mutant_idle, mutant_jumping, mutant_punch, mutant_run, mutant_walking. Use Cleanup/Merge before any Infinite Brutality runtime adoption.
